testcase.name: noDataNoSync
testcase.system-out: 10:27:26.567 [main] INFO com.medical360.integration.sync.SyncOrchestratorService -- 开始数据同步流程... 10:27:26.568 [main] INFO com.medical360.integration.sync.SyncOrchestratorService -- [LIS] 无新数据需要同步 10:27:26.568 [main] INFO com.medical360.integration.sync.SyncOrchestratorService -- [RIS] 无新数据需要同步 10:27:26.568 [main] INFO com.medical360.integration.sync.SyncOrchestratorService -- 数据同步流程完成: SyncResult{status={LIS=true, RIS=true}, errors={}}
